title: keetia foetida
intro: Keetia foetida, also known as the stinking keetia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Keetia foetida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and in some cases, it is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
